name: 2 Amys

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current restaurant-linked Square category map and all 1,104 products across its six API pages.
Only seven frozen products still correspond to current menu items; 122 are historical products no longer assigned to a live storefront category, and one is an official-homepage placeholder artifact.

The corrected catalog contains 64 current food and beverage rows; it adds 59 current items missing from the frozen app, excludes 12 live merchandise rows, and places alcoholic beverages after food and dessert.
2 Amys does not publish a complete allergen matrix; no allergen absence or general cross-contact safety claim is made.
The current Square item descriptions directly support 35 positive or may-contain rows; the other 29 correctly remain allergen-data unavailable.
Signals use only explicit menu terms such as mozzarella, anchovy, cod, cockles, egg, bread, pine nuts, almond, mustard, and the explicit may-contain-nuts statement.
The frozen source request captured only page 1 of a six-page, 1,104-product Square catalog and treated historical category memberships as current menu membership.
Every frozen row was assigned the generic Pizza category even when it was steak, wine, beer, coffee, a side, or a website placeholder.
The correction uses the current Square bootstrap category links as the membership boundary, joins those category ids across all six product pages, and excludes the live merchandise category.

findings.summary: The frozen app showed 122 historical products that are no longer on the current Square menu and missed 59 current menu items.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt the menu from the current storefront category map joined against all six current Square product pages.

findings.summary: All 130 frozen rows were mislabeled Pizza, including alcohol, meat cuts, coffee, sides, and a homepage placeholder.
findings.resolution: Restored eleven real food and beverage sections and removed the placeholder and merchandise rows.

findings.summary: The stale frozen catalog omitted current items and their direct ingredient signals; one surviving renamed pepper-and-anchovy row also omitted wheat/gluten from its stated bread accompaniment.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt direct signals from current item descriptions, preserving 35 supported positive/may-contain rows and leaving 29 rows unavailable.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 64-item current Square snapshot using live storefront categories across all six product pages, with real sections, merchandise excluded, beverages last, and conservative allergen evidence.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/2-amys-repair-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 64 unique items, eleven real sections, 35 direct/may-contain rows, 29 unavailable rows, merchandise excluded, and beverages last)

notes: The official 2 Amys homepage establishes restaurant identity and links the Square storefront; the current menu content itself has restaurant_linked_vendor authority.
Focused six-page catalog, current-category membership, reconciliation, targeted repair-copy, unique-id, section-order, merchandise exclusion, and allergen-source checks passed.
